issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is not a valid trigger type. Must be one of: OnPlay, OnAttack, OnAttacked, OnKO, OnBlock, Counter, Trigger (as OnDamage-equivalent), Activated, StartOfTurn, EndOfTurn
Missing or ambiguous trigger definition. 'Trigger' alone is not actionable. Specify the exact event: OnPlay, OnAttack, OnAttacked, OnKO, OnBlock, Counter, Activated, or StartOfTurn/EndOfTurn
